items.headline: New mixed-use development approved for East Middlefield Road
items.summary: Mountain View City Council approved a development agreement for a mixed-use residential project at 490 East Middlefield Road on the March 24 regular session. This project will add housing and likely commercial space to the area.

items.headline: Mountain View applies for state housing incentive funding
items.summary: The city submitted an application for California's Prohousing Incentive Program (Round 4) to help fund housing development. This state grant program supports cities that streamline housing approvals and remove regulatory barriers.

items.headline: City seeking public input on $1M+ federal housing grant plan
items.summary: Santa Clara is holding a public hearing on March 24 to gather community feedback on how to spend federal HUD housing funds for 2026-27. Residents can weigh in on priorities like affordable housing, homelessness services, or neighborhood improvements before the plan is finalized.

items.headline: City holding community meeting on safe parking program
items.summary: Sunnyvale is hosting a public meeting on Monday, March 23 to discuss its safe parking initiative, which typically provides designated parking areas for people experiencing homelessness. This is a chance for residents to learn about and weigh in on how the program works in the city.

items.headline: Task Force reviewing major changes to Santa Clara Station area
items.summary: The Station Area Task Force is reviewing a new land use plan and design guidelines that will shape development around Santa Clara Station. This could significantly affect housing density, street design, and the character of the downtown area near the transit hub.
